first_person:
On [NOT IN NOTES] at approximately 10:15pm I, Sgt. Justin Peterman, was notified by Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell that Inmate Smith, [NOT IN NOTES] ADC#[NOT IN NOTES] and Inmate Williams, [NOT IN NOTES] ADC#[NOT IN NOTES] were fighting in 8 Barracks. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Smith was on top of Inmate Williams throwing punches. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Williams appeared to have a cut over his left eye and was bleeding. 

I pulled Inmate Smith off. Sgt Peterman cuffed Smith, Cpl Powell cuffed Williams placed hand restraints onto Inmate Williams and Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns escorted him to Restrictive Housing.

Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell and Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Sohns escorted both inmates to Restrictive Housing. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Williams was evaluated by Infirmary staff. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Williams received 3 sutures to his eyebrow. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Smith refused medical treatment. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that photos were taken of Inmate Williams' injuries and blood on the floor. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Lt. [NOT IN NOTES] Roberts was notified at approximately 10:20pm. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that both inmates claimed the other started the fight. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell stated that Inmate Smith stated, "that pussy been running his mouth all week, I told him I'd fuck him up".
supervisor_summary:
On [NOT IN NOTES] at approximately ~10:15pm Sgt. Justin Peterman observed Inmate Smith, [First Name] ADC#[Number] and Inmate Williams, [First Name] ADC#[Number] fighting in 8 Barracks. Sgt. Justin Peterman arrived at the scene. Sgt. Justin Peterman observed Inmate Smith on top of Inmate Williams throwing punches. Inmate Williams appeared to have a cut over his left eye and was bleeding. Sgt. Justin Peterman pulled Inmate Smith off of Inmate Williams. 

Sgt Peterman cuffed Smith, Cpl Powell cuffed Williams placed hand restraints onto Inmate Williams and Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns escorted him to Restrictive Housing.

Inmate Williams was evaluated by Infirmary staff. Inmate Williams received 3 sutures to his eyebrow. Inmate Smith refused medical treatment. Photos were taken of Inmate Williams' injuries and blood on the floor. Lt. [First Name] Roberts was notified at approximately 10:20pm. Inmate Smith and Inmate Williams both claimed the other started the fight. Inmate Smith stated, "that pussy been running his mouth all week, I told him I'd fuck him up".
cover_letter: On [NOT IN NOTES] I, Sgt. Justin Peterman, was notified by the reporting officer who was working as [NOT IN NOTES] that at approximately 10:15pm Inmate Smith, [NOT IN NOTES] ADC#[NOT IN NOTES] and Inmate Williams, [NOT IN NOTES] ADC#[NOT IN NOTES] were fighting in 8 Barracks. Inmate Smith and Inmate Williams was involved in a physical altercation at BMU in 8 Barracks on [NOT IN NOTES] (refer to BMU Incident Report [NOT IN NOTES]). The reporting officer stated that they arrived and observed Inmate Smith on top of Inmate Williams throwing punches. I responded to 8 Barracks. I pulled Inmate Smith off of Inmate Williams. I cuffed Inmate Smith. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell cuffed Inmate Williams. Lt. [NOT IN NOTES] Roberts was notified at approximately 10:20pm. I observed that Inmate Williams appeared to have a cut over his left eye and was bleeding. Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Powell and Cpl. [NOT IN NOTES] Sohns escorted Inmate Smith and Inmate Williams to Restrictive Housing. Inmate Williams was evaluated by Infirmary staff. Inmate Williams received 3 sutures to his eyebrow. Inmate Smith refused medical treatment. Photos were taken of the injuries of Inmate Williams and the blood on the floor. Inmate Smith stated that Inmate Williams started the fight. Inmate Williams stated that Inmate Smith started the fight.
